Container.Name: filearr-postgres
Container.Overview:
PostgreSQL 18 for filearr — source of truth for the catalog AND the job queue (Procrastinate). Pinned to 18.4 (fixes 11 CVEs vs 18.0). Uses PG18's native uuidv7() and async I/O (io_method=worker, set via Post Arguments).
Install this container FIRST. Requires the user-defined Docker network 'filearr': docker network create filearr
Back up with pg_dump; the Meilisearch index is disposable but this database is not.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Database files. Keep on cache/appdata (fast pool), NOT on the array.

Config.Name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Database password — must match the DSNs in filearr and filearr-worker

Config.Name: Port (optional)
Config.Description: Only map if you need external DB access (psql/pgAdmin from LAN). Leave empty otherwise.
